keyEvents.text: Andrés Herrera (Columbus Crew) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Sporting Kansas City 0, Columbus Crew 1. Wessam Abou Ali (Columbus Crew) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Taha Habroune.
Jacob Bartlett (Sporting Kansas City) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half begins Sporting Kansas City 0, Columbus Crew 1.

Goal! Sporting Kansas City 1, Columbus Crew 1. Dejan Joveljic (Sporting Kansas City) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Jake Davis following a fast break.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Hugo Picard replaces Dániel Gazdag.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Sékou Bangoura replaces Taha Habroune.
Goal! Sporting Kansas City 2, Columbus Crew 1. Dejan Joveljic (Sporting Kansas City) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner following a fast break.
Sean Zawadzki (Columbus Crew) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Sporting Kansas City. Stephen Afrifa replaces Calvin Harris.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Jamal Thiaré replaces Steven Moreira.
Goal! Sporting Kansas City 2, Columbus Crew 2. Diego Rossi (Columbus Crew) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner.
Penalty saved. Wessam Abou Ali (Columbus Crew) right footed shot saved in the bottom left corner by John Pulskamp (Sporting Kansas City).
Substitution, Sporting Kansas City. Jansen Miller replaces Ian James.
Substitution, Sporting Kansas City. Kwaku Agyabeng replaces Jacob Bartlett.
Substitution, Sporting Kansas City. Taylor Calheira replaces Shapi Suleymanov.
Second Half ends, Sporting Kansas City 2, Columbus Crew 2.
